initiatives.name: Palestinian Youth Movement
initiatives.description: Transnational, independent, grassroots movement of young Palestinians organizing for the liberation of Palestine and the return of all Palestinian refugees.

initiatives.name: International Solidarity Movement (ISM)
initiatives.description: A Palestinian-led movement committed to resisting the Israeli occupation of Palestinian land using nonviolent, direct-action methods and principles. ISM provides on-the-ground international presence and witnesses human rights violations while supporting Palestinian-led nonviolent resistance.

initiatives.name: US Campaign for Palestinian Rights (USCPR)
initiatives.description: A national coalition of organizations working together for Palestinian rights and liberation through advocacy, mutual aid, and grassroots mobilization. They coordinate direct support for Palestinian communities, resource sharing, and solidarity initiatives while building power through collective action and intersectional movement building.

initiatives.name: Mennonite Action
initiatives.description: A movement of Mennonites organizing mutual aid and direct action for Palestine solidarity. They coordinate resources, organize nonviolent actions, and build interfaith coalitions while providing material support and advocating for peace and justice through their faith-based approach.

initiatives.name: Friends of Sabeel North America (FOSNA)
initiatives.description: An interdenominational Christian organization providing mutual aid and solidarity through education, advocacy, and nonviolent action for Palestine. They amplify Palestinian voices and coordinate support through church networks, community organizing, and direct action campaigns.

initiatives.name: Adalah Justice Project
initiatives.description: Palestinian Advocacy Organization based in the U.S., aiming to shift policy & public discourse on Palestine + Organizing for collective liberation

initiatives.name: Friends of Palestinian Medical Relief Society (FPMRS)
initiatives.description: Friends of PMRS is a US-based nonprofit, 501c(3), tax-exempt organization which exists to support the work of the Palestinian Medical Relief Society in Palestine.

initiatives.name: CPT Palestine
initiatives.description: A team of Community Peacemaker Teams providing mutual aid and nonviolent intervention in Palestine, particularly in Al-Khalil/Hebron. They work alongside Palestinian communities through direct support, documentation of human rights violations, and solidarity actions.

initiatives.name: International Jewish Anti-Zionist Network (IJAN)
initiatives.description: A network of Jews fostering mutual aid and solidarity through anti-colonial and anti-imperialist organizing. They coordinate direct actions, political education, and solidarity networks while building power through Jewish participation in Palestinian liberation struggles and creating spaces for collective resistance against Zionism and oppression.

initiatives.name: Rebuilding Alliance
initiatives.description: A humanitarian organization fostering mutual aid and solidarity through direct support to Palestinian communities. They coordinate rebuilding projects, emergency relief, and advocacy initiatives while building power through grassroots partnerships, policy change campaigns, and creating spaces for Palestinian voices to be heard by Congress and decision-makers.

initiatives.name: BDS Movement
initiatives.description: A Palestinian-led movement fostering mutual aid and solidarity through boycott, divestment, and sanctions campaigns. They coordinate global grassroots initiatives, economic advocacy, and solidarity networks while building power through nonviolent pressure for Palestinian rights and creating spaces for international civil society to support Palestinian liberation.

initiatives.name: Decolonize This
initiatives.description: A grassroots collective fostering mutual aid and solidarity through Palestinian liberation organizing and decolonial education in the Bay Area. They coordinate direct actions, political education, and solidarity networks while building power through anti-colonial resistance, community organizing, and creating spaces for Palestinian solidarity and liberation.

initiatives.name: Refuser Solidarity Network
initiatives.description: A network providing support for Israeli war resisters and conscientious objectors through mutual aid and solidarity initiatives. They coordinate legal support, media campaigns, and educational programs while building power through anti-war organizing, resistance to occupation, and creating spaces for Jewish voices against militarism.

initiatives.name: Palestinian Feminist Collective
initiatives.description: A collective of Palestinian and Arab feminists fostering mutual aid and solidarity through intersectional organizing against gendered, sexual, and colonial violence. They coordinate educational resources, community support, and solidarity networks while building power through feminist approaches to Palestinian liberation and creating spaces for feminist resistance and collective action.

initiatives.name: Al-Awda: The Palestine Right to Return Coalition
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and solidarity through Palestinian right of return advocacy and community organizing. They coordinate direct support initiatives, educational programs, and solidarity networks while building power through Palestinian diaspora organizing, anti-colonial resistance, and creating spaces for Palestinian cultural preservation and collective liberation.

initiatives.name: BADIL Resource Center
initiatives.description: An independent human rights organization fostering mutual aid and solidarity through research, advocacy, and community support focused on Palestinian refugee and residency rights. They coordinate legal resources, policy research, and solidarity networks while building power through rights-based approaches, documentation of forced displacement, and creating spaces for Palestinian refugee advocacy.

initiatives.name: Al-Shabaka: The Palestinian Policy Network
initiatives.description: A global network of Palestinian experts fostering mutual aid and solidarity through critical policy analysis and research. They coordinate policy development, knowledge production, and solidarity networks while building power through Palestinian expertise, strategic thinking, and creating spaces for imagining and developing pathways to liberation.

initiatives.name: Filipinos for Palestine National Network
initiatives.description: A network of U.S. based Filipinos fostering mutual aid and solidarity for a free Palestine. They coordinate advocacy for immediate ceasefire, an end to the military siege and blockade of Gaza and the West Bank, and an end to U.S. aid that funds war in Palestine. They build power through coalition-building, direct action, and creating spaces for Filipino solidarity with Palestinian self-determination and liberation.

initiatives.name: Samidoun: Palestinian Prisoner Solidarity Network
initiatives.description: international network of organizers and activists working to build solidarity with Palestinian prisoners in their struggle for freedom.

initiatives.name: Theater Workers for a Ceasefire
initiatives.description: US-based theater workers demand a ceasefire in Palestine.

initiatives.name: Writers Against the War on Gaza
initiatives.description: Building a cultural front for a free Palestine. They write and publish the New York War Crimes.

initiatives.name: Pal Shield
initiatives.description: American - Palestinian led organization providing life-saving supplies to protect Palestinian farmers and communities.
